replace_powers

replace_powers.Rd

replace_powers

Usage

replace_powers(v)

Arguments

v

a character vector

Examples

print(replace_powers(c("2^3.1","10^-6","x^2")))
#> [1] "pow(2, 3.1)"  "pow(10, -6)"  "gsl_pow_2(x)"

On this page
